rules.reason: the extension and its server integrate only through shared/ (the vendored single-source of categories/normalizeUrl) and the HTTP contract — never by referencing each other's code

accept.reason: the server's deploy/OAuth guide documents how the two halves relate (the extension manifest key, config.mjs client id, `cd ../extension` build) — cross-cutting setup docs, not a code coupling; the server ships no import of extension code
a comment notes the server must allow X-Client-Version in CORS (template.yaml AllowHeaders) — documentation of the HTTP contract, not a code reference into server/
